candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears as a component within the production/cost of revenues build-up and the selected parent row 'Cost of revenues/COGS' is the total bucket that already includes it.
COGS-related by label, but the row is blank in the preview and also appears as a sub-component under production costs rather than a separate add-on outside the selected COGS total.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: COGS-related by label, but the row is blank in the preview and appears to be a sub-component of production/cost of revenues, so not a separate addition to the selected COGS total.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is [Income Statement] Cost of revenues/COGS. The visible D&A row sits within the production/COGS composition and therefore looks already embedded in the selected total rather than a separate same-level operating line to add later.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related D&A row appears under both 'Administrative expenses' and 'Distribution and marketing costs', indicating it is a component inside those selected SG&A buckets rather than a separate same-level add-on.

R&D-related D&A row under the selected 'Development costs' parent. Since 'Development costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding this separately would risk distortion/double counting under the stated R&D interaction rule.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses - Balancing value
candidates.why: Another R&D D&A component under 'Development costs'; it appears nested within the selected development-cost bucket, not as a separate same-level operating line. Also should not be added given Development costs is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
Administration-related D&A by label, but blank in the preview and appears to be a sub-component within selected 'Administrative expenses'.
Administration-related amortisation by label, but blank in the preview and appears to be a sub-component within selected 'Administrative expenses'.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Distribution and Marketing Costs
candidates.why: Distribution/marketing-related D&A by label, but blank in the preview and appears to be a sub-component within selected 'Distribution and marketing costs'.

candidates.row_label: Amortization in Distribution and Marketing Costs
candidates.why: Distribution/marketing-related amortisation by label, but blank in the preview and appears to be a sub-component within selected 'Distribution and marketing costs'.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combined set of [Income Statement] Selling, General & Admin, Development costs, Administrative expenses, and Distribution and marketing costs. The visible D&A rows appear nested within those selected parent expense lines, not outside them. In addition, Development costs is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so R&D D&A should not be added separately.
